parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=You are an email classification AI. Analyze the following email and extract structured information.

Email Content:
---
{{ $json.body.email_content }}
---

Extract and return ONLY valid JSON with these fields:
{
  "sender_name": "extracted name or 'Unknown'",
  "email_type": "one of: info, order, request, invoice, support_request, other",
  "topic": "brief topic summary",
  "summary": "2-3 sentence summary",
  "date_deadline": "extracted date/deadline or null",
  "cost_amount": "extracted cost or null",
  "phone_number": "extracted phone or null",
  "priority": "low, medium, or high",
  "action_required": "yes or no",
  "additional_info": "any other important details"
}

Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text.

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO email_classifications (
  sender_name,
  sender_email,
  email_type,
  topic,
  summary,
  date_deadline,
  cost_amount,
  phone_number,
  priority,
  action_required,
  additional_info,
  original_email,
  received_at,
  processed_by
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.sender_name }}',
  '{{ $json.sender_email }}',
  '{{ $json.email_type }}',
  '{{ $json.topic }}',
  '{{ $json.summary }}',
  {{ $json.date_deadline ? "'" + $json.date_deadline + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.cost_amount ? "'" + $json.cost_amount + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.phone_number ? "'" + $json.phone_number + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  '{{ $json.action_required }}',
  '{{ $json.additional_info }}',
  '{{ $json.original_email }}',
  '{{ $json.received_at }}',
  '{{ $json.processed_by }}'
) RETURNING id;
